div.p: Variable-length format: 1 byte (no operand) or 3 bytes (with 16-bit operand). Byte-aligned, Big-Endian.
Big-Endian Encoding: High byte first (Most Significant Byte). value = (high << 8) | low Total size: 3 bytes if operand present.
Total: 1 byte Stops VM execution gracefully.
Total: 3 bytes Loads constants[5] onto stack. Index: (0x00 << 8) | 0x05 = 5
